contents.value:
```tsx
const Accordion: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AccordionProps>
```
A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content. Built on Radix UI Accordion.

```tsx
<Accordion type="single" collapsible>
  <AccordionItem value="item-1">
    <AccordionTrigger>Title</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Content</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

```tsx
const AccordionItem: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AccordionItemProps>
```
Contains all parts of a collapsible section within an Accordion. Requires a unique `value` prop.

```tsx
const AccordionTrigger: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AccordionTriggerProps>
```
Toggles the collapsed state of its associated AccordionItem.

```tsx
const AccordionContent: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AccordionContentProps>
```
Contains the collapsible content for an AccordionItem. Animates open/close.

```tsx
const Alert: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AlertProps & { variant?: 'default' | 'destructive' }>
```
Displays a callout for important information. Supports `default` and `destructive` variants.

```tsx
<Alert variant="destructive">
  <AlertTitle>Error</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Something went wrong.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

```tsx
const AlertTitle: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>>
```
Title element rendered inside an Alert component.

```tsx
const AlertDescription: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>>
```
Description element rendered inside an Alert component.

```tsx
const AlertDialog: React.FC<AlertDialogProps>
```
A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response. Built on Radix UI AlertDialog.

```tsx
<AlertDialog>
  <AlertDialogTrigger>Open</AlertDialogTrigger>
  <AlertDialogContent>
    <AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogTitle>Are you sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
      <AlertDialogDescription>This cannot be undone.</AlertDialogDescription>
    </AlertDialogHeader>
    <AlertDialogFooter>
      <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
      <AlertDialogAction>Continue</AlertDialogAction>
    </AlertDialogFooter>
  </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>
```

```tsx
const AlertDialogTrigger: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AlertDialogTriggerProps>
```
The button that opens the AlertDialog. Use `asChild` to merge onto a custom trigger element.

```tsx
const AlertDialogContent: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AlertDialogContentProps>
```
The content container for the AlertDialog overlay.

```tsx
const AlertDialogAction: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AlertDialogActionProps>
```
The confirm action button that closes the AlertDialog.

```tsx
const AlertDialogCancel: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AlertDialogCancelProps>
```
The cancel button that closes the AlertDialog without action.
```tsx const AspectRatio: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent ``` Displays content within a desired aspect ratio. Built on Radix UI AspectRatio. ```tsx ```

```tsx
const Avatar: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AvatarProps>
```
An image element with a fallback for representing the user. Built on Radix UI Avatar.

```tsx
<Avatar>
  <AvatarImage src="url" />
  <AvatarFallback>CN</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>
```

```tsx
const AvatarImage: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AvatarImageProps>
```
The image to render inside an Avatar. Falls back to AvatarFallback on load error.

```tsx
const AvatarFallback: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<AvatarFallbackProps>
```
Fallback element rendered when AvatarImage fails to load. Typically shows initials.

```tsx
const Badge: React.FC<BadgeProps & VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants>>
```
Displays a badge or label. Variants: `default`, `secondary`, `outline`, `destructive`.

```tsx
<Badge variant="secondary">New</Badge>
```

```tsx
const Button: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<ButtonProps & VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants>>
```
A button component with multiple variants and sizes.

Variants: `default`, `destructive`, `outline`, `secondary`, `ghost`, `link`
Sizes: `default`, `sm`, `lg`, `icon`

```tsx
<Button variant="outline" size="sm">Click me</Button>
```

```tsx
const Calendar: React.FC<CalendarProps>
```
A date picker calendar built on react-day-picker. Supports `single`, `multiple`, and `range` selection modes.

```tsx
<Calendar mode="single" selected={date} onSelect={setDate} />
```

```tsx
const Card: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>
```
A container with header, content, and footer sections.

```tsx
<Card>
  <CardHeader><CardTitle>Title</CardTitle></CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Content</CardContent>
</Card>
```

```tsx
const CardHeader: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>
```
The header section of a Card. Contains CardTitle and CardDescription.

```tsx
const CardTitle: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>>
```
The title element within a CardHeader.

```tsx
const CardDescription: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLParagraphElement>>
```
The description element within a CardHeader.

```tsx
const CardContent: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>
```
The main content area of a Card.

```tsx
const CardFooter: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>
```
The footer section of a Card.

```tsx
const Checkbox: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<CheckboxProps>
```
A control that allows toggling between checked and not checked. Built on Radix UI Checkbox.

```tsx
<Checkbox checked={checked} onCheckedChange={setChecked} />
```

```tsx
const Collapsible: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<CollapsibleProps>
```
An interactive component which expands/collapses content. Built on Radix UI Collapsible.

```tsx
const Command: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<CommandProps>
```
Fast, composable command menu. Built on cmdk.

```tsx
<Command>
  <CommandInput placeholder="Search..." />
  <CommandList>
    <CommandGroup heading="Suggestions">
      <CommandItem>Item</CommandItem>
    </CommandGroup>
  </CommandList>
</Command>
```

```tsx
const CommandDialog: React.FC<CommandDialogProps>
```
A dialog wrapper for the Command component for modal command palette usage.

```tsx
const ContextMenu: React.FC<ContextMenuProps>
```
Displays a menu at the pointer's position on right-click. Built on Radix UI ContextMenu.

```tsx
const Dialog: React.FC<DialogProps>
```
A window overlaid on the primary content. Built on Radix UI Dialog.

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger>Open</DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader><DialogTitle>Title</DialogTitle></DialogHeader>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

```tsx
const DialogContent: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<DialogContentProps>
```
The content container for Dialog with overlay backdrop and close button.

```tsx
const DialogTrigger: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<DialogTriggerProps>
```
The element that triggers opening the Dialog. Use `asChild` to compose with custom elements.

```tsx
const DialogTitle: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<DialogTitleProps>
```
Accessible title for the Dialog. Required for screen reader support.

```tsx
const DialogDescription: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<DialogDescriptionProps>
```
Accessible description for the Dialog.

```tsx
const Drawer: React.FC<DrawerProps>
```
A drawer component for mobile-friendly panels that slides in from the screen edge. Built on vaul.

```tsx
const DropdownMenu: React.FC<DropdownMenuProps>
```
Displays a menu triggered by a button. Built on Radix UI DropdownMenu.

```tsx
<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger>Open</DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent>
    <DropdownMenuItem>Item</DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

```tsx
const Form: React.FC<FormProviderProps>
```
Form component wrapping react-hook-form's FormProvider. Provides form context to FormField children.

```tsx
const form = useForm();
<Form {...form}>
  <form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)}>
    <FormField ... />
  </form>
</Form>
```

```tsx
const FormField: <TFieldValues, TName>({ control, name, render }) => ReactElement
```
Connects a form control to react-hook-form with automatic error handling. Uses render prop pattern.

```tsx
<FormField control={form.control} name="email" render={({ field }) => (
  <FormItem>
    <FormLabel>Email</FormLabel>
    <FormControl><Input {...field} /></FormControl>
    <FormMessage />
  </FormItem>
)} />
```

```tsx
const FormItem: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>
```
Container for a single form field including label, control, description, and message.

```tsx
const FormLabel: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<LabelProps>
```
Accessible label for a form field. Automatically associated with the FormControl.

```tsx
const FormControl: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<SlotProps>
```
Wraps the form input element with proper aria attributes (aria-describedby, aria-invalid).

```tsx
const FormDescription: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<HTMLParagraphElement>
```
Descriptive help text displayed below a form control.

```tsx
const FormMessage: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<HTMLParagraphElement>
```
Displays the validation error message for a form field. Automatically reads from react-hook-form error state.

```tsx
const HoverCard: React.FC<HoverCardProps>
```
For sighted users to preview content available behind a link. Built on Radix UI HoverCard.

```tsx
const Input: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<InputProps>
```
A styled HTML input element that extends native input attributes.

```tsx
<Input type="email" placeholder="Enter email" />
```

```tsx
const Label: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<LabelProps>
```
Renders an accessible label associated with controls. Built on Radix UI Label.

```tsx
<Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
```

```tsx
const Popover: React.FC<PopoverProps>
```
Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button. Built on Radix UI Popover.

```tsx
const Progress: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<ProgressProps>
```
Displays a progress indicator. Built on Radix UI Progress.

```tsx
<Progress value={60} />
```

```tsx
const RadioGroup: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<RadioGroupProps>
```
A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked at a time. Built on Radix UI RadioGroup.

```tsx
const ScrollArea: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<ScrollAreaProps>
```
Augments native scroll with custom cross-browser styling. Built on Radix UI ScrollArea.

```tsx
const Select: React.FC<SelectProps>
```
Displays a list of options for the user to pick from. Built on Radix UI Select.

```tsx
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Pick" /></SelectTrigger>
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">A</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

```tsx
const Separator: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<SeparatorProps>
```
Visually or semantically separates content. Supports horizontal and vertical orientation.

```tsx
const Sheet: React.FC<SheetProps>
```
A panel that slides in from the edge of the screen. Sides: `right`, `left`, `top`, `bottom`.

```tsx
const Skeleton: React.FC<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>>
```
Used to show a placeholder while content is loading.

```tsx
<Skeleton className="h-4 w-[250px]" />
```

```tsx
const Slider: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<SliderProps>
```
An input for selecting a value from a range. Built on Radix UI Slider.

```tsx
<Slider defaultValue={[50]} max={100} step={1} />
```

```tsx
const Switch: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<SwitchProps>
```
A toggle control that switches between on and off states. Built on Radix UI Switch.

```tsx
const Table: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLTableElement>>
```
A responsive table with TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption subcomponents.

```tsx
const Tabs: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<TabsProps>
```
A set of layered sections of content displayed one at a time. Built on Radix UI Tabs.

```tsx
<Tabs defaultValue="tab1">
  <TabsList><TabsTrigger value="tab1">Tab 1</TabsTrigger></TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="tab1">Content</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

```tsx
const Textarea: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<TextareaProps>
```
A styled textarea element for multi-line text input.

```tsx
<Textarea placeholder="Type here..." />
```

```tsx
const Toast: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<ToastProps>
```
A succinct message displayed temporarily. Variants: `default`, `destructive`.

```tsx
const Toaster: React.FC<{}>
```
Renders toast notifications. Place once in your root layout.

```tsx
// app/layout.tsx
<Toaster />
```

```tsx
const Toggle: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<ToggleProps>
```
A two-state button that can be on or off. Built on Radix UI Toggle.

```tsx
const ToggleGroup: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<ToggleGroupProps>
```
A group of toggle buttons. Supports `single` and `multiple` selection types.

```tsx
const Tooltip: React.FC<TooltipProps>
```
A popup that displays information on hover/focus. Must be wrapped in TooltipProvider.

```tsx
<TooltipProvider>
  <Tooltip>
    <TooltipTrigger>Hover</TooltipTrigger>
    <TooltipContent>Info</TooltipContent>
  </Tooltip>
</TooltipProvider>
```

```tsx
const TooltipProvider: React.FC<TooltipProviderProps>
```
Required ancestor for Tooltip components. Typically wraps your entire app or a section of it.

```tsx
const TooltipTrigger: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<TooltipTriggerProps>
```
The element that triggers the Tooltip on hover or focus.

```tsx
const TooltipContent: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<TooltipContentProps>
```
The content displayed inside the Tooltip popup.

```tsx
function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]): string
```
Merges Tailwind CSS class names using `clsx` and `tailwind-merge`. Handles conditional classes, deduplication, and conflict resolution.

```tsx
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
cn("px-2 py-1", isActive && "bg-primary text-white");
```

```tsx
const buttonVariants: (props?: { variant?, size? } & ClassProp) => string
```
Pre-defined CVA variant function for Button. Apply button styles to non-button elements.

```tsx
<Link className={buttonVariants({ variant: "outline" })}>Link</Link>
```
```tsx const badgeVariants: (props?: { variant? } & ClassProp) => string ``` Pre-defined CVA variant function for Badge. Apply badge styles to any element. ```tsx Tag ```

```tsx
function toast(props: ToastProps): { id, dismiss, update }
```
Imperatively show a toast notification.

```tsx
toast({ title: "Done", description: "Task completed.", variant: "default" });
```

```tsx
function useFormField(): { invalid, isDirty, isTouched, error?, id, name, formItemId, formDescriptionId, formMessageId }
```
Returns the current form field context. Used internally by Form subcomponents.

```tsx
asChild?: boolean
```
Radix UI prop that merges the component's props onto its child element instead of rendering a default wrapper element.

```tsx
<DialogTrigger asChild>
  <Button>Open Dialog</Button>
</DialogTrigger>
```

```css
--background: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for the default page background color. Set in `:root` and `.dark` selectors in globals.css.

```css
--foreground: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for the default text/foreground color.

```css
--primary: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for the primary brand color. Used by Button default variant and other primary elements.

```css
--secondary: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for the secondary color. Used by Button secondary variant.

```css
--muted: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for muted backgrounds and text.

```css
--accent: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for accent highlights like hover states.

```css
--destructive: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for destructive action colors.

```css
--border: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for default border colors.

```css
--input: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for input element border colors.

```css
--ring: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for focus ring outline colors.

```css
--radius: <rem-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for the global border radius.

```css
--card: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for card background color.

```css
--popover: <hsl-value>
```
shadcn/ui CSS variable for popover background color.
